name: Contineum Therapeutics, Inc.
business: Contineum Therapeutics is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company pioneering differentiated therapies for the treatment of NI&I indications with significant unmet need. The company focuses on developing selective small molecule drug candidates targeting challenging molecular pathways, with its two clinical-stage drug candidates being PIPE-791 and PIPE-307. PIPE-791 is a novel, brain penetrant, small molecule inhibitor of the lysophosphatidic acid 1 receptor (LPA1R) in development for idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis (IPF) and chronic pain, and PIPE-307 is a selective, small-molecule inhibitor of the muscarinic type 1 receptor (M1R) in development for depression and relapse-remitting multiple sclerosis (RRMS).

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company pioneering differentiated therapies for the treatment of NI&I indications with significant unmet need.

catalysts.event: Initiation of Phase 2 trial of PIPE-791 in IPF
catalysts.sentence: The data from the Phase 1b PET trial further affirmed the planned dose selection for our Phase 2 trial of PIPE-791 in IPF, which was initiated in December 2025.

catalysts.event: Top-line data from Phase 1b chronic pain trial of PIPE-791
catalysts.sentence: We anticipate top-line data from this trial in the second quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Completion of enrollment for Phase 1b chronic pain trial of PIPE-791
catalysts.sentence: In the fourth quarter of 2025, we completed enrollment for a phase 1b, randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled, crossover study which was designed to explore the safety and efficacy of oral PIPE-791 in subjects with COAP or CLBP.

catalysts.event: Top-line data from Phase 2 VISTA trial of PIPE-307 for RRMS
catalysts.sentence: In November 2025, we reported top-line data from our Phase 2 VISTA trial of PIPE-307 for the treatment of patients with RRMS.

catalysts.event: Initiation of Phase 2 Moonlight-1 trial of PIPE-307 for MDD by J&J
catalysts.sentence: In December 2024, J&J began recruiting an estimated 124 adult participants for the Phase 2 Moonlight-1 trial of PIPE-307, renamed by J&J to JNJ-89495120.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 130,000 patients with IPF in the United States
tamClaims.sentence: In the United States alone, there are approximately 130,000 patients with IPF, with a reported median survival after diagnosis ranging between two to five years.

tamClaims.claim: Worldwide prevalence of IPF estimated to be three million cases as of 2023
tamClaims.sentence: As of 2023, worldwide prevalence is estimated to be three million cases, with an overall incidence that is increasing worldwide.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 33 million people in the United States with chronic osteoarthritic pain (COAP) and 595 million globally
tamClaims.sentence: There are approximately 33 million people in the United States with COAP and 595 million people globally.

tamClaims.claim: Low back pain affects approximately 619 million people globally and 45 million people in the United States
tamClaims.sentence: Low back pain affects approximately 619 million people globally and 45 million people in the United States.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 280 million people globally and nearly 20% of U.S. adults suffer from depression
tamClaims.sentence: Depression is one of the most common mood disorders with approximately 280 million people globally and nearly 20% of U.S. adults suffering from the disorder.

tamClaims.claim: Nearly 1 million patients in the United States and estimated 2.8 million globally with MS in 2020
tamClaims.sentence: Effective treatments for the progressive neurodegeneration in MS remain one of the largest unmet needs for the nearly 1 million patients in the United States and estimated 2.8 million globally living with this disorder in 2020.
